violations.description: Hot time/temperature control for safety food not adequately temperature controlled.
violations.resolution: Time/temperature control for safety food shall be hot held at 57°C (135°F) or above.
violations.observations: Today the hot-holding unit  on the right was only reaching a temperature of 122.6F. Ensure this unit is reaching at or above 135F. Correct this before you open up to the public.

violations.description: Cold time/temperature control for safety food not adequately temperature controlled.
violations.resolution: Time/temperature control for safety food shall be cold held at 5°C (41°F) or less. Eggs shall be stored at a temperature of 7°C (45°F) or less.
violations.observations: Today the salad bar and the under counter in the back were reaching temperatures between 70 - 84F. Ensure these units are set at or below 41F. Correct before opening up to the public.

violations.description: Walls, floors and ceilings not maintained smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non absorbent where required.
violations.resolution: Materials for indoor floor, wall, and ceiling surfaces under conditions of normal use shall be: smooth, durable, and easily cleanable for areas where food establishment operations are conducted; closely woven and easily cleanable carpet for carpeted areas; and nonabsorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, warewashing areas, toilet rooms, mobile food establishment servicing areas, and areas subject to flushing or spray cleaning methods.
violations.observations: There are several areas in this facility that are not considered smooth, durable, or easily cleanable. Correct all of the areas we talked about before you open up to the public.
